emails.subject: Thanks for your application - Software Analyst - Intern (R1012380)

Your application for the Summer A 2026 batch of the MLH Fellowship
 Program. has been received! =?UTF-8?B?8J+OiQ==?=
emails.body:
Image ( fellowship.mlh.io?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io )

***********************************
Your application has been received!
***********************************

Hey, there --

Thank for applying to the Summer A 2026 batch of the MLH Fellowship Program. -- we are so excited to get to know more about you! Your application has been received and is currently pending review.

If you applied for our next available start date, you should expect to hear from our admissions team regarding any next steps via email approximately six weeks from now.

If you applied for another term, please note that the process may take a bit longer. This is because we have to meet with our partners before each new term to determine the projects as well as the profiles we’re looking for, before we can start accepting fellows. To keep you updated, we will send you an email as soon as we start reviewing your application.

We will periodically send you updates to this email address as your application advances through the admissions process. Please ensure you read them in full and perform any requested action(s) in a timely manner. Applications are processed on a rolling basis, which means that we are continuously reviewing applications and extending acceptances to the program until the batch is filled.

If you ever have any questions about the fellowship or need help with your application, just respond to this email or send a new one to fellowship@mlh.io ( fellowship@mlh.io?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io ) using the same email you applied with. We wish you the best of luck!

 

While you’re waiting to hear back, enjoy these two ( https://developers.facebook.com/blog/post/2021/05/11/docusaurus-contributor-story-samuel-adjei/?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io ) stories ( https://developers.facebook.com/blog/post/2021/06/07/vissl-contributor-story-grace-omotoso/?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io ) from our amazing Fellows!

 

Happy Hacking,
The MLH Fellowship Team

149 East 23rd Street #438
New York, NY, 10159 United States
Copyright Major League Hacking © 2022

( https://www.instagram.com/mlhacks/?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io )( https://www.facebook.com/MajorLeagueHacking/?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io )( https://twitter.com/MLHacks?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io )( https://discord.mlh.io?ajs_uid=019de15a-1340-2204-affd-ed688f5127b2&utm_campaign=Fellowship+-+Stage+Change+Emails&utm_content=Application+Confirmation&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Customer.io )
